column1: Hey Savio, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Yo Savio Victoria mentioned youre in the group with her sister, happy to help y'all get situated
hi yes i would like to join their trip but get a separate 2 person room
okay perfect. who will be in the room with you
okay cool. just added in the additional room. Lauren can hop in the open TBA slot below your name. do you have the link?
perfect. its all ready to go now
hi Savio we need you and Lauren to make your deposits otherwise the spaces will clear
my apologies we were planning on sitting down later today and paying for everything, do you think we would have time to make that payment later today or is this urgent and needs to be paid now
later today is fine, what time were you planning on doing so? ill put the note on your accounts
is everything good so far, if so, do i need to send our flight information for the airport transfers
Hi yes there's a flight info tab on your account, you'll enter your flight info into there
thank you so much just uploaded the flight information that will be the same flight itinerary for both me and Lauren
If you have any questions feel free to text me
any chance we can add another room or would it be too late
We can, theyll just need to be ready to pay like as soon as its opened
hey is it just 4 total people in for the group
yes as far as i know
Hey Savio do you know if Britt or Charlotte are still going on the trip?
hey Savio are you and Lauren on the same flight?
sorry im pretty sure charlotte and her friend r still going but i dont know for sure i can ask victoria, her sister
shit yea idrk them or what their plan was bc thats j my friends younger sister
gotcha. its all good got in contact with them!
Savio! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
we're still considering it, we have until 48 hours before to still add those packages right?
and just to be clear lauren is also listed in the transportation services?
yea you have up to 48 and lauren is all set yes
